text: As I step inside and approach the boldly colored R+D wall, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The modern design and welcoming lights invite me to question and explore. Each word and display panel stirs my intellect, beckoning me to ponder the relationship between humanity, research, and technology. I am keenly aware of the harmony and tension between past discoveries and future possibilities. In this space, I feel both grounded and uplifted by the pursuit of knowledge.
